steps.description: Press the F1 key to open the "Command Palette" in Visual Studio Code workspace interface.
Type text 'Welcome: Open Walkthrough' into the command palette search box in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the highlighted "Welcome: Open Walkthrough" command in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Click on the "Build a Declarative Agent Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" walkthrough option in the dropdown list within the Visual Studio Code interface.
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface within Visual Studio Code.
Type 'Preferences: Color Theme' into the command palette of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Preferences:Color Themes" option in the command palette within Visual Studio Code.
Click on the "Light+" option in the "Select Color Theme" dropdown menu within the Visual Studio Code interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Set up your environment" option in the guided tutorial section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Build a declarative agent" button under the "Set up your environment" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Preview in Microsoft 365 Copilot" button in the "Build a Declarative Agent" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Improve your declarative agent" section header in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to expand its content.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Resources" button located within the "Improve your declarative agent" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Press the F1 key to open the command palette in Visual Studio Code while interacting with the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension pane.
Type 'Preferences: Color Theme' into the command palette search box in the Microsoft 365 Copilot interface.
Press the Enter key to confirm the selection of "Preferences: Color Theme" in the Visual Studio Code command palette.
Click the "Dark Modern" option in the "Select Color Theme" dropdown menu.
Click the "Introduction" radio button in the "Build a Declarative Agent" section of the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Set up environment" option under the "Introduction" section in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit welcome interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the checkbox for "Build a declarative agent" under the "Set up your environment" section in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Preview in Microsoft 365 Copilot" option within the "Build a Declarative Agent" tutorial section, located on the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Improve your declarative agent" section header in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface to expand or interact with additional options.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
Click the "Resources" link under the "Improve your declarative agent" section in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit guided tutorial interface.
@assertion  All images and elements have no glaring contrast, no transparency issues, and are clearly visible (not swallowed up by the background color).
